description_long: This is a rectangular office desk with a wood-toned top and dark-colored base, positioned on a brown floor mat. On the desk surface, there is a large computer monitor, a keyboard, a mouse, and several scattered office supplies, suggesting active use. A white, mesh-backed office chair with wheels is tipped over in front of the desk, adding a sense of recent movement or disruption. The desk appears to have a solid, blocky construction with no visible drawers or shelves, and the monitor is centrally placed. The overall setup is typical of a modern workspace, with the chair and computer as the main functional elements. The scene is clean and organized, with no visible signs of damage or excessive wear.
description: A modern office desk with a wood top, dark base, computer monitor, and a tipped-over white office chair on a brown mat. The setup suggests an active workspace with scattered office supplies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the desk surface with a computer monitor, keyboard, mouse, office supplies, and a tipped-over white chair in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the chair's position, and the arrangement of items on the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the monitor and the solid back panel of the desk, with the chair less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tipped-over chair more clearly and the side of the desk with visible items on top.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the tipped-over chair and computer monitor, indicating the front; the back is a solid panel with no workspace features.
